All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
JacksonVersion
The supported Jackson versions.
JSONObfuscator
An obfuscator that obfuscates JSON properties in CharSequences or the contents of Readers.
JSONObfuscator.Builder
A builder for JSONObfuscators.
JSONObfuscator.LimitConfigurer
An object that can be used to configure handling when the obfuscated result exceeds a pre-defined limit.
JSONObfuscator.PropertyConfigurer
An object that can be used to configure a property that should be obfuscated.
JSONObfuscator.PropertyConfigurer.ObfuscationMode
The possible ways to deal with nested objects and arrays.
